steps.t: The smugglers' hideout can be found in the Lake-town underbelly. You should find the smugglers' hideout.
The smugglers' hideout can be found in the Lake-town underbelly. You should talk to the door guard.
The smugglers' hideout can be found in the Lake-town underbelly. You should seize the smugglers' leader, Skótmun.
Dagrun can be found in the Trade Commission Headquarters. You should talk to Dagrun.
